name: Subtree of Another Tree
description: Given the roots of two binary trees root and subRoot, return true if there is a subtree of root with the same structure and node values as subRoot, and false otherwise.
constraints: The number of nodes in root is in [1, 2000]. The number of nodes in subRoot is in [1, 1000]. -10^4 <= Node.val <= 10^4.

performance.stress_intent: exercise overlapping duplicate-valued shapes; constraints do not justify rejecting the standard rooted-subtree scan
